title: How can we get the current user?
excerpt: If two people are using the same custom board (React App), how can we get information for each user? We want to figure out which one is a member of the workspace, and which is a guest? I wasn’t too sure how the board cou…

posts.author: driftgod99 (VP)
posts.cookedHtml: If two people are using the same custom board (React App), how can we get information for each user? We want to figure out which one is a member of the workspace, and which is a guest? I wasn’t too sure how the board could access this info using the Monday sdk. Thanks!

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @driftgod99, you can get the user id by using the sessionToken value from the SDK.

You can look at the query here - GitHub - mondaycom/monday-sdk-js: Node.js and JavaScript SDK for developing over the monday.com platform

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: To add on to what Mitchell said, you can also use our API’s “me” field to return the current user’s information. Here is an example: { me { id name } }

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
